health_conditions: keloid scar on face (from popped pimple, 20 years old)

benefits.description: keloid scar on face reduced by over 50% in less than 4 weeks of GHK-Cu use; keloid went from fitting in finger nail to not fitting; much less noticeable after 4 weeks, verified by before/after photos with same lighting and angle

protocol_notes: Started Tirzepatide in October, no keloid changes noted until GHK-Cu 2.5mg daily started in December. Photo comparison taken December 15 (start date) vs current shows dramatic reduction. References published articles on GHK-Cu and keloid scar reduction.
